entities.name: SORGHUM

entities.name: SALINITY STRESS
entities.description: Condition of high salt concentration in soil affecting plant growth

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced by the plant

entities.name: POT EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A controlled experimental setup using pots to evaluate plant response

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: Individual traits that contribute to the overall grain yield

entities.name: SALINE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field environments characterized by high electrical conductivity

entities.description: The location in India where saline field conditions were tested

entities.name: NORMAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field environments with non-saline soil

entities.name: PATANCHERU, ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The location in India where normal field conditions were tested

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days required for 50% of the plants to flower

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant from the ground to the tip

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall growth and productivity of the crop

entities.name: STAY-GREEN SCORES
entities.description: A measure of the plant's ability to maintain green leaves during grain filling

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC AND GENETIC COEFFICIENTS OF VARIATION
entities.description: Statistical parameters used to measure the extent of variation in a population

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors including soil and climate that influence trait expression

entities.name: HYBRID PARENTS
entities.description: Genetic lines used to produce hybrid offspring

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: Lines used to maintain the purity of a hybrid parent

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: Lines used to restore fertility in hybrid offspring

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Cultivated varieties of sorghum
